schemes.name_en: Puducherry Chief Minister Health Insurance Scheme
schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year health cover for all Puducherry families at select hospitals
schemes.benefit_hi: सभी पुदुच्चेरी परिवारों को ₹5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा

schemes.benefit_en: Free housing + essential amenities for SC/Adi Dravidar families in Puducherry
schemes.benefit_hi: SC/ आदि द्राविड़ परिवारों को मुफ्त आवास + जरूरी सुविधाएं
schemes.eligibility: SC/Adi Dravidar BPL families in Puducherry

schemes.name_en: Puducherry Special Incentive Scheme for Industries
schemes.benefit_en: Power tariff subsidy + building plan fee waiver for new industries in Puducherry
schemes.benefit_hi: पुदुच्चेरी में नए उद्योगों को बिजली दर सब्सिडी + नक्शा शुल्क माफी
schemes.eligibility: Entrepreneurs establishing industries in Puducherry UT
